subject: Fermi GBM trigger 526978609/170913289 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

���The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 526978609/170913289
at 06:56:44.85 UT on 13 September 2017, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
